nasb.text: One who is gracious to a poor man lends to the Lord, And He will repay him for his good deed.

esv.text: Whoever is generous to the poor lends to the Lord, and he will repay him for his deed.

cnv.text: 恩待窮人的，等於借錢給耶和華； 他所行的，耶和華必償還。

ccb.text: 善待穷人等于借贷给耶和华， 耶和华必回报他的善行。

csbs.text: 人恩待贫弱者，就是借予耶和华； 耶和华将照着他所行的偿还给他。
